ItacAcademyItem.Name: Renati (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: One publication related to the Renati Academy, but not included in British Library collections, is: Gnavio, Caio, Forza d`amore comedia piacevole, & nuova, di Caio Gnavio di Samo dottore e cavaliere, recitata in Venetia da signori academici Renati, l`anno 1602 (In Venetia: appresso Antonio Turini, 1614) ALSO AVAILABLE AS: Appresso Giacomo Violati, with print ornament as a ship on the titlepage.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
